title: Bihar 2025: Election Forecasting Stack
tagline: Multi-task ensemble with sub-5-minute prediction latency.
description: Ensemble of Bayesian hierarchical models, gradient-boosted learners, and transformer-based NLP for constituency-level forecasts, with a streaming pipeline ingesting polls, news, and social signals.
highlights: Multi-task seat-level win probability and vote-margin estimates

title: COVID-19 X-Ray Classification with HPC
tagline: Mac-optimized CNN training pipeline for chest X-rays.
description: HPC-optimized COVID-19 detection from chest X-rays with a training pipeline tuned for Apple Silicon's Accelerate framework.
highlights: CNN architecture for chest X-ray classification

title: CLAD-PV: Cyber-Physical Security for Solar Systems
tagline: Physics-guided IDS for solar inverter networks.
description: Intrusion detection system for solar inverter networks combining SunSpec/Modbus protocol parsing with anomaly detection grounded in power-system physics.
highlights: Physics-guided anomaly detection for solar inverters
Detects power-injection attacks and data manipulation

title: CPS Threat Modeling for Solar Inverters
tagline: STRIDE/DREAD threat model for grid-tied solar networks.
description: End-to-end threat-modeling exercise for grid-tied solar inverter networks: architecture diagrams, STRIDE/DREAD matrix, and gap-analysis with security recommendations.
highlights: Architecture diagram for solar inverter networks
STRIDE/DREAD threat matrix and risk assessment

title: Global Product Catalog: Multi-Region Distributed System
tagline: DynamoDB Global Tables with sub-50ms cross-region reads.
description: Distributed product catalog using DynamoDB Global Tables for multi-region active-active replication. Terraform-managed infrastructure with k6 load testing demonstrating cross-region consistency.
highlights: k6 load testing with 1000+ concurrent users

title: Customer Churn Prediction System
tagline: Dockerized churn prediction with ensemble ML.
description: Dockerized churn-prediction service for subscription data with comprehensive preprocessing and a production-ready inference API.
highlights: Ensemble ML models for churn prediction

title: Aether: Emotionally Aware Conversational AI
description: Conversational AI backend using Hugging Face transformers with a focus on emotionally aware response generation and empathetic dialogue.

title: Tripsy: AI Travel Assistant with RAG
description: Retrieval-augmented travel-planning assistant combining geographic embeddings and route-API integration, with multi-component infrastructure for backend, frontend, and orchestration.
highlights: Reduced hallucinations by 35% vs GPT-only baseline

title: Global Airport Dashboard
tagline: D3.js geospatial visualization of worldwide airports.
description: Interactive web dashboard for exploring global airport data, with D3.js charts, geospatial mapping, and filtering.

title: NASA Logs Billing Dashboard
tagline: Credit-based billing over NASA HTTP log events.
description: Credit-based billing service that processes NASA HTTP logs as billable events, with a Plotly dashboard for usage analytics and invoice generation.

title: LocalMapReduce: Distributed Computing Framework
tagline: Local MapReduce on LevelDB with multiprocessing.
description: Local MapReduce simulation using Python and LevelDB for distributed data processing, with near-linear scaling on 8 cores.

title: Haven: Local-First Personal Finance Assistant
description: Local-first personal-finance assistant with ML-based expense categorization, personalized budget recommendations, and a privacy-preserving architecture where user data never leaves the device.
